Gemma 4 response: VALID: Atari 2600 console
The Atari 2600 was the industry-standard home video game console in 1983, making it a perfect period-accurate centerpiece.

SUBSTITUTE: Wood-grain joystick controller -> Black CX40 joystick
While the Atari 2600 console itself featured wood-grain side panels, the standard controllers used during this era were iconic black plastic joysticks.

audio_specs.sound_effect_prompt: A heavy, tactile plastic click of a 1980s power switch, the gritty mechanical thud of a game cartridge being shoved into a slot, followed by a sudden burst of warm analog electronic hum and low-bit white noise from an old CRT television screen, nostalgic and slightly muffled.
audio_specs.ambient_layer: Low-frequency hum of a cathode-ray tube television, distant midwestern summer crickets, and the faint, rhythmic ticking of a wall clock.
